name: Crown Agents Bank
description: Bank reduces cost and friction of moving money to, from and across developing, emerging and frontier markets, focusing on Sub Saharan Africa. Acquired by funds managed by Helios Investment Partners in April 2016 and acquired Segovia in April 2019.

# Welcome to
_Crown Agents Bank_
We deliver prosperity into the markets we serve by moving money where it’s needed and turning complex financial challenges into seamless opportunities for our partners.
We remove barriers, cut through complexity, and deliver FX and enhanced payments with speed, security, and clarity. We treat every client as a partner, working together to move money – confidently, compliantly, and without compromise. With decades of trust in the world’s most dynamic markets, we help our clients deliver.

##### About us
## We move _money_
Crown Agents Bank is a UK-regulated bank focused on emerging markets. Driven by our mission to support prosperity in hard-to-reach regions, Crown Agents Bank provides vital financial services through specialist FX, cross-border payments, trade finance, and treasury management work. Our relationship-led model, global market access and deep regional expertise means we can facilitate the two-way flow of funds throughout the world’s most complex financial markets.
We deliver prosperity in markets we serve, and do so guided by our values of integrity, partnership, and innovation. We are committed to operating transparently and ethically, forging strong relationships with our clients, and continually seeking new ways to drive positive change in the financial sector. By placing our clients’ needs at the heart of everything we do, we strive to make a meaningful impact in emerging markets and support global prosperity.
###### [Contact us](https://www.crownagentsbank.com/contact/)
##### Company history
## Trust _takes time_
Trusted by a global ecosystem of leading institutions across the public, private and development sectors, Crown Agents Bank’s strength lies in its network, which connects its clients to underserved geographies by giving them access to 120+ currencies across 800+ currency pairs. With a history spanning nearly 200 years, the bank partners closely with clients and understands the nuances of local markets to ensure risk mitigation, improve the flow of money, and champion financial inclusion so that equitable and truly global markets can flourish.
We combine heritage with agility to solve tomorrow’s challenges for our clients.
###### [Our team](https://www.crownagentsbank.com/team/)
### 1833
Joint Agents appointed by the British Government
### 1870
Floated loan bonds on the London Securities market
### 1971
Crown Agents appointed by DFID for disbursement of UK aid
### 1989
Crown Agents Bank established
### 1997
Privatised by UK Government
### 2016
Acquired by Helios Investment Partners
### 2017
Launch of EMpower FX online trading platform
### 2019
Acquisition of Segovia
### 2023
Parent company, CAB Payments Holdings ltd, floated on London Stock Exchange
### 2023
B Corp certification
### 2024
CAB Payments Europe, based in Amsterdam, gains payments licence
### 2025
Acquired US licence and opened representative office in New York
‹›
##### Expertise
##  _Our_ people
Our employees are the cornerstone of our success, embodying our commitment to building lasting partnerships and understanding client needs. Their expertise and dedication enable us to offer a truly relationship-driven service, ensuring we deliver prosperity in to the markets we serve.
###### [Meet our executive team and board of directors here](https://www.crownagentsbank.com/team/)
![corporates office interior](https://www.crownagentsbank.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/corporates.jpg)
##### testimonials
## What our clients
_say about us_
> “We operate in countries which are perceived as ‘high risk’ to mainstream banks and money transfer agents, which makes transferring funds to our branch offices and partners slow and complicated. However, since we started using CAB ebanking and Webtrader platforms, many of these issues have been resolved. Funds are sent swiftly and securely, meaning our projects can proceed without the delays previously encountered.
> We have also received strong trading support via the WebTrader platform, with competitive rates and reliable execution. The team are always willing to help out and are open to negotiation in order to provide the best deals for our transfers. We have found their customer service to be consistently quick, reliable, and responsive ensuring queries are solved in a prompt hassle-free manner.
> Overall, our experience with Crown Agents Bank has been highly positive, and we value the consistency and quality of both their service and trading capabilities.”
> STREET CHILD
> “Our partnership with Crown Agents Bank was instrumental in navigating the complex challenges we face across African markets. They didn’t just support us, they worked alongside us with their local knowledge and technical expertise, which made a real difference to the business we do.”
> Aditya Birla Global Trading

##### Hard to source currencies, seamlessly delivered
##  _Access 120+ currencies_ across 800+ currency pairs
Our currency capabilities span Africa, LATAM, the Caribbean, Asia Pacific and the Middle East, as well as G10 countries. A full list can be found below.
###### [View Currency Capability](https://www.crownagentsbank.com/market-coverage/)
120
+
currencies and markets
800
+
currency pairs
##### Shaping finance as a force for good
## Responsible business
Responsible business isn’t a passing phase for Crown Agents Bank, it’s a way of working. We are proud to help build stronger financial ecosystems, promote financial inclusion, and invest in solutions that last. From minimising our environmental footprint to supporting sustainable growth in emerging markets, we want to leave every market we touch better than we found it.
###### [Responsible business](https://www.crownagentsbank.com/sustainability/)
![Crown Agents Bank is connecting hard to reach markets](https://www.crownagentsbank.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/cab-video-preview.jpg)
##### Sectors
##  _Customer_ segments
### Banks
Trusted expertise, robust infrastructure and strong regulation to simplify cross-border and local operations, access hard-to-trade currencies, and manage liquidity confidently.
[](https://www.crownagentsbank.com/sectors/banks/)
### Non-Bank Financial Institutions
Access reliable currencies and cross-border payment corridors with ease, security and scalability, empowering confident transactions in evolving markets.
[](https://www.crownagentsbank.com/sectors/non-banks/)
###  Humanitarian & Development Organisations
Whether you are moving large volumes to local banks or making multiple smaller transactions to get funding to projects on the ground, we have experience and expertise to make it easy.
[](https://www.crownagentsbank.com/sectors/humanitarian-and-development-organisations/)
### Corporates
Operate across diverse and challenging markets where traditional banks face difficulties, with reliable, fast and cost-effective solutions for cross-border payments, FX and trade finance.
[](https://www.crownagentsbank.com/sectors/corporates/)
